description: Unit and E2E tests for the AutoService framework covering channel-server routing, channel-client registration, web relay bridge, explain command pipeline, and full integration flows

key_symbols.name: test_channel_connects_and_registers
key_symbols.description: Tests that ChannelClient connects to a mock WebSocket server and sends a register message with correct type, chat_ids, and instance_id fields

key_symbols.name: _start_server
key_symbols.description: Helper: creates and starts a ChannelServer with feishu_enabled=False on a given port

key_symbols.name: _stop_server
key_symbols.description: Helper: stops a running ChannelServer

key_symbols.name: _connect
key_symbols.description: Helper: opens a websockets client connection to the server

key_symbols.name: _send_json
key_symbols.description: Helper: sends a dict as JSON over a WebSocket

key_symbols.name: _recv_json
key_symbols.description: Helper: receives and parses a JSON message from a WebSocket with timeout

key_symbols.name: test_server_accepts_connection
key_symbols.description: Tests that the channel-server accepts WebSocket connections and keeps them open

key_symbols.name: test_register_and_route
key_symbols.description: Tests registering a client with a specific chat_id then routing a message to it and verifying receipt

key_symbols.name: test_wildcard_receives_copy
key_symbols.description: Tests that a wildcard (*) registered instance receives a copy of messages routed to a specific instance, with a routed_to hint

key_symbols.name: test_registration_conflict
key_symbols.description: Tests that registering the same chat_id twice produces a REGISTRATION_CONFLICT error

key_symbols.name: test_unregister_on_disconnect
key_symbols.description: Tests that disconnecting a client clears its routes from the exact_routes table and _ws_to_instance map

key_symbols.name: test_inbound_message_routing
key_symbols.description: Tests that a message sent by an unregistered web client gets routed to a wildcard-registered instance

key_symbols.name: server
key_symbols.description: pytest fixture: creates a ChannelServer with feishu_enabled=False and admin_chat_id='oc_admin_test'

key_symbols.name: TestExplainCommand
key_symbols.description: Test class for the /explain admin command in ChannelServer

key_symbols.name: TestExplainCommand.test_explain_no_query_returns_usage
key_symbols.description: Tests that /explain with no query returns a Usage message via _reply_feishu

key_symbols.name: TestExplainCommand.test_explain_routes_to_wildcard
key_symbols.description: Tests that /explain with a query replies with 'analyzing' status and routes an explain-mode message to admin_explain chat_id with correct runtime_mode and admin_chat_id

key_symbols.name: TestExplainCommand.test_help_includes_explain
key_symbols.description: Tests that the help_text() output includes /explain

key_symbols.name: TestFlowYAML
key_symbols.description: Test class validating YAML flow definitions in .autoservice/flows/ directory

key_symbols.name: TestFlowYAML.test_index_has_all_flows
key_symbols.description: Tests that _index.yaml lists all flow YAML files in the flows directory (skips if flows/ not yet created)

key_symbols.name: TestFlowYAML.test_flow_has_required_fields
key_symbols.description: Tests that each flow YAML file has all required fields: id, name, description, tags, entry, exits, nodes, edges

key_symbols.name: TestFlowYAML.test_flow_entry_node_exists
key_symbols.description: Tests that each flow's entry field references an existing node id

key_symbols.name: TestFlowYAML.test_flow_edges_reference_valid_nodes
key_symbols.description: Tests that all edges in each flow reference valid node ids for both from and to

key_symbols.name: TestExplainRoute
key_symbols.description: Test class for the /explain/* HTTP route in the web app

key_symbols.name: TestExplainRoute.test_explain_serves_existing_file
key_symbols.description: Tests that GET /explain/<file>.html serves an existing HTML file from .autoservice/explain/ directory

key_symbols.name: TestExplainRoute.test_explain_404_for_missing
key_symbols.description: Tests that GET /explain/<nonexistent>.html returns 404

key_symbols.name: test_web_bridge_connects_and_registers
key_symbols.description: Tests that WebChannelBridge connects to a mock channel-server and registers with chat_ids=['web_*'] and role='web'

key_symbols.name: test_web_bridge_demuxes_replies
key_symbols.description: Tests that WebChannelBridge demultiplexes incoming replies to the correct subscriber queue by chat_id

key_symbols.name: ok
key_symbols.description: Helper: prints pass message and increments PASS counter

key_symbols.name: fail
key_symbols.description: Helper: prints fail message and increments FAIL counter

key_symbols.name: main
key_symbols.description: Main E2E test function containing 7 tests: (1) wildcard registration, (2) message routing to wildcard, (3) mode fields preservation, (4) reply protocol, (5) specific + wildcard dual routing, (6) registration conflict rejection, (7) status text generation. Starts its own ChannelServer in-process with feishu_enabled=False.

key_symbols.name: cleanup
key_symbols.description: Shell trap function: closes agent-browser session and kills background server processes

key_symbols.name: Step 0: Start services
key_symbols.description: Starts channel-server (FEISHU_ENABLED=0) and web server (uvicorn) as background processes

key_symbols.name: Step 1: Generate access code
key_symbols.description: Calls /admin/new-code API to get an access code for login

key_symbols.name: Step 2: Login page
key_symbols.description: Uses agent-browser to open login page, fill access code, and submit

key_symbols.name: Step 3: Chat page connection
key_symbols.description: Verifies redirect to /chat and checks WebSocket connection status

key_symbols.name: Step 4: Send message
key_symbols.description: Types and sends a chat message, checks if user message appears in the UI

key_symbols.name: Step 5: End session
key_symbols.description: Clicks end session button

key_symbols.name: Step 6: Logout
key_symbols.description: Clicks logout button and verifies redirect back to /login

external_dependencies.fastapi.testclient: HTTP test client for web app routes
external_dependencies.pyyaml: YAML parsing for flow definition tests

test_coverage_map.tests/test_channel_server.py: feishu.channel_server (ChannelServer WebSocket routing: accept, register, route, wildcard, conflict, disconnect cleanup, inbound message routing)
test_coverage_map.tests/test_explain_command.py: feishu.channel_server (admin /explain command) + .autoservice/flows/ (YAML schema validation) + web.app (/explain/* HTTP route)
test_coverage_map.tests/test_web_relay.py: web.websocket (WebChannelBridge connect, register, and reply demultiplexing)
test_coverage_map.tests/e2e/test_feishu_mock.py: feishu.channel_server (full E2E: registration, routing, mode preservation, reply protocol, dual routing, conflict, status text)
test_coverage_map.tests/e2e/test_web_chat.sh: web.app + feishu.channel_server (full browser E2E: login, chat, send message, end session, logout via agent-browser)

external_services_notes.tests/e2e/test_web_chat.sh: Requires agent-browser CLI tool, starts channel-server and uvicorn web server as background processes, uses curl for API calls
